items.title: How The Allegion (ALLE) Story Is Shifting As Margin Questions Temper Earlier Optimism
items.description: Allegion is back in focus as Street price targets have been trimmed in recent weeks, with some moving from US$190 to US$180 and from US$187 to US$180, even while one model keeps Fair Value unchanged at US$179.55. Those changes reflect how analysts are weighing near term margin pressure in the Americas against recent reports of margin strength and a demand backdrop tied to artificial intelligence related orders. As you read on, you will see how these shifting targets shape the evolving...

items.title: Delta Air Lines to Present at the J.P. Morgan Industrials Conference
items.description: Delta Air Lines (NYSE:DAL) will present at the J.P. Morgan Industrials Conference at 7:30 a.m. ET on Tuesday, March 17th, 2026.

items.title: Columbus McKinnon Provides Update on Timing of Presentation at Upcoming J.P. Morgan Industrials Conference
items.description: Columbus McKinnon Corporation (Nasdaq: CMCO) ("Columbus McKinnon" or the "Company"), previously announced that it would present at the 2026 J.P. Morgan Industrials Conference (the "Conference") on March 17, 2026, at approximately 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time. The Company now expects to present at the Conference at approximately 4:20 p.m. Eastern Time on March 17, 2026.

items.title: Dover to Present at the J.P. Morgan Industrials Conference
items.description: Dover Corporation (NYSE: DOV) announced that its President and Chief Executive Officer, Richard J. Tobin, will speak at the 2026 J.P. Morgan Industrials Conference in Washington, D.C., on Tuesday, March 17, 2026, at 9:30 am ET.

items.title: Bank Stocks Have Gotten Hit Hard. It’s Time to Think About Buying.
items.description: Bank stocks are looking like a steal right now, especially as they benefit from—not buckle under—artificial intelligence.  The  exchange-traded fund, which holds the largest investment banks and many lenders throughout the country, is down 12% from its 2026 high, worse than the S&P 500’s 3% fall from this year’s peak.  Bank multiples can plunge during stressful times for the financial sector or the economy, but they can rise into the teens when everything is humming along just fine—and that’s a distinct possibility.
